prompt_snapshot:
16:9 horizontal Chinese blog cover illustration, 2560x1440.
Use the provided chibi Avilia reference as the character identity anchor: red hair, black outfit, cross detail. The article is a reflective personal essay, so keep the image quiet and sincere.

Scene: Avilia walks through a cold morning campus path with frost on the grass. In the distance, a soft sign says "北邮". A faint translucent calendar page marked "一年" floats in the air. She looks surprised and calm, realizing time has passed quickly.

Core meaning: one year after getting into graduate school, the memory feels unreal and time has moved quietly.

Style: clean Chinese blog illustration, white winter space, black/red/white identity, restrained pale blue cold air. Minimal labels: "一年", "回望", "不真实感".

Avoid dramatic victory pose, avoid giant title text, avoid crowded school details.
